golden_categories.name: Basic Email Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating standard email formats and basic rules.

golden_categories.name: Domain-Specific Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with domain-specific rules.

golden_categories.name: Underscore in Domain
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with underscores allowed in the domain.

golden_categories.name: UTF8 Local Part Restriction
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses without UTF8 characters in the local part.

golden_categories.name: Display Name Support
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with optional display names.

golden_categories.name: Required Display Name
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with mandatory display names.

golden_categories.name: IP Domain Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with IPs allowed as domains.

golden_categories.name: Blacklisted Characters
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with restrictions on specific characters in the name.

golden_categories.name: Max Length Restriction
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with maximum length restrictions.

golden_categories.name: Ignore Max Length
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with maximum length ignored.

golden_categories.name: Blacklisted Domains
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with denylisted domains.

golden_categories.name: Blacklist with Regular Expressions
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with domain blacklist using regular expressions.

golden_categories.name: Whitelisted Domains
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with allowed domains.

golden_categories.name: Whitelist with Regular Expressions
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with domain whitelist using regular expressions.

generated_categories.name: Standard Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests the default behavior and baseline email validation rules.

generated_categories.name: Display Name Options
generated_categories.description: Tests options related to allowing or requiring display names in email addresses.

generated_categories.name: Local Part Restrictions
generated_categories.description: Tests options that restrict or modify the local part of email addresses.

generated_categories.name: Domain Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests options related to domain-specific validation, including TLD requirements and blacklists/whitelists.

generated_categories.name: IP Domain Allowance
generated_categories.description: Tests the option to allow IP addresses as domains in email addresses.

generated_categories.name: Length Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests options related to ignoring maximum length restrictions for email addresses.

golden_to_generated.reason: The generated category 'Standard Validation' aligns with the golden category 'Basic Email Validation' as both focus on baseline email validation rules.
The generated category 'Domain Validation' includes domain-specific validation, which matches the golden category 'Domain-Specific Validation'.

The generated category 'Local Part Restrictions' partially overlaps with 'Underscore in Domain' as it includes restrictions on the local part but does not explicitly focus on underscores in the domain.
The generated category 'Local Part Restrictions' explicitly covers restrictions on UTF8 characters in the local part, matching the golden category 'UTF8 Local Part Restriction'.
The generated category 'Display Name Options' includes tests for allowing display names, aligning with the golden category 'Display Name Support'.
The generated category 'Display Name Options' includes tests for requiring display names, aligning with the golden category 'Required Display Name'.
The generated category 'IP Domain Allowance' directly matches the golden category 'IP Domain Validation' as both focus on allowing IPs as domains.
The generated category 'Local Part Restrictions' includes blacklisted character restrictions, which partially overlaps with the golden category 'Blacklisted Characters'.
The generated category 'Length Validation' includes tests for ignoring maximum length restrictions, which partially overlaps with the golden category 'Max Length Restriction'.
The generated category 'Length Validation' explicitly covers ignoring maximum length restrictions, aligning with the golden category 'Ignore Max Length'.
The generated category 'Domain Validation' includes blacklisted domains, aligning with the golden category 'Blacklisted Domains'.
The generated category 'Domain Validation' includes blacklists using regular expressions, aligning with the golden category 'Blacklist with Regular Expressions'.
The generated category 'Domain Validation' includes whitelisted domains, aligning with the golden category 'Whitelisted Domains'.
The generated category 'Domain Validation' includes whitelists using regular expressions, aligning with the golden category 'Whitelist with Regular Expressions'.

generated_to_golden.reason: The generated category 'Standard Validation' aligns with the golden category 'Basic Email Validation' as both focus on baseline email validation rules.
The generated category 'Display Name Options' covers both allowing and requiring display names, aligning with the golden categories 'Display Name Support' and 'Required Display Name'.
The generated category 'Local Part Restrictions' partially overlaps with 'Underscore in Domain', matches 'UTF8 Local Part Restriction', and partially overlaps with 'Blacklisted Characters'.

The generated category 'Domain Validation' includes domain-specific validation, blacklists, and whitelists, aligning with the golden categories 'Domain-Specific Validation', 'Blacklisted Domains', 'Blacklist with Regular Expressions', 'Whitelisted Domains', and 'Whitelist with Regular Expressions'.
The generated category 'IP Domain Allowance' directly matches the golden category 'IP Domain Validation' as both focus on allowing IPs as domains.
The generated category 'Length Validation' includes tests for ignoring maximum length restrictions, which partially overlaps with 'Max Length Restriction' and aligns with 'Ignore Max Length'.
